# SilkQuote

> Frictionless quote PDFs, deal room, and e-sign for Salesforce. Generate branded PDFs from Opportunities, share them in a deal room, and close with e-signature. Free for unlimited users.

SilkQuote is a native Salesforce quoting app for Opportunity-based quoting, branded PDF output, deal room sharing, e-signature, and fast setup. Admins configure branded templates and field mapping. Reps generate quote PDFs from Salesforce Opportunities, share a hosted deal room, and capture signature activity without external tools.

**Key facts:**
- Opportunity-based quote PDF generation
- Free: unlimited users, quotes, and templates
- Works with Salesforce Professional Edition and above
- No-code template setup for admins
- One-click quote generation from any Opportunity
- Native Salesforce integration (Lightning Experience)
- Collaborative deal room with e-signature, Q&A, shared resources, and next steps
- Quote view tracking, open tracking, and acceptance logging
- Invocable from Salesforce Flows for automation
